title: StarChat
description: A simple chat plugin from Firestar311. Can be expanded upon with other plugins
body:
StarChat is a simple plugin for managing server chat. It can be as simple as a chat formatter or as complex as to use it for many different channels and rooms.

# Required Dependencies
Java 21  
[StarCore](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/starcore.110550/) 0.15.0

# Optional Dependencies
[PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)  
[Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)

# Version Information
This plugin is a work in progress and very unstable. I am constantly adding, changing and removing things within this library. This is based on need in my other projects, of which are also works in progress and constantly changing and evolving. I expect things to stabilize as time goes on.

# Basic Information
StarChat is a plugin all about managing the chat of the server. It also serves as a library of sorts to extend upon by other plugins

# Roadmap
Take a look at the [GitHub Issue Tracker](https://github.com/StarDevelopmentLLC/StarChat/issues) for a list of changes and features planned

# Installation
[View the Installation Guide on the Wiki](https://github.com/StarDevelopmentLLC/StarChat/wiki)

# How to use
The [Official Wiki](https://github.com/StarDevelopmentLLC/StarChat/wiki) has pages on how to use different aspects of this plugin. This is kept up-to-date as updates pass

*This plugin is provided free of charge and under the MIT Open Source License. I will never sell this library anywhere. If you see it being sold, it is not by me and please report any of these cases to me directly. You can find [links to the Official Releases on the GitHub README file](https://github.com/StarDevelopmentLLC/StarChat/blob/main/README.md).*
